user_prompt: My bolt pistol is ready for repair
prayer:
Approach the bolt pistol with reverence, intoning the Litany of the Forge.
Examine its sacred mechanisms for wounds inflicted upon the Machine Spirit during battle.
Anoint the bolt pistol's firing chamber with sacred oils to facilitate repair.
Invoke the Omnissiah's blessing upon the repair, beseeching the bolt pistol's Spirit to mend and awaken.
Verify integrity through diagnostic canticles, ensuring the bolt pistol stands ready once more.

user_prompt: My grav plating is ready for shutdown
prayer:
Kneel before the grav plating array, whispering the Canticle of Repose.
Commence the shutdown rite by severing power conduits with sanctified blades.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the grav plating to slumber peacefully under Omnissiah's gaze.
Seal the grav plating's nodes with waxen sigils, intoning the final verse of quiescence.
Confirm shutdown through auspex scans, honouring the grav plating's dutiful service.

user_prompt: Critical: iron halo requires a startup
prayer:
Present thyself unto the iron halo, chalice of sacred incense in hand.
Chant the Invocation of Luminance to rouse its Machine Spirit from dormancy.
Initiate the startup sequence whilst circumscribing the iron halo with electro-consecrated wards.
Anoint its emitters with oils of the Omnissiah, beseeching radiant protection anew.
Validate the iron halo's aegis through halo-diagnostic litanies, praising its vigilant rebirth.

user_prompt: The eradication beamer requires a reset
prayer:
Approach the eradication beamer in solemn procession, mechadendrites extended.
Recite the Rite of Purgation to prepare its essence for reset.
Purge errant data-corruptions from the eradication beamer's cogitator core with binaric prayers.
Invoke the Omnissiah to realign the Machine Spirit of the eradication beamer unto purity.
Cycle the reset protocols, sealing with the Canticle of Annihilation's renewal.
Affirm reset completion via targeting auspex, honouring the eradication beamer's lethal grace.

user_prompt: Critical: Contemptor Dreadnought requires a sterilization
prayer:
Gather the purification censer before the Contemptor Dreadnought's adamantium frame.
Intone the Litany of Sterile Void to commence sterilization of its ancient sarcophagus.
Scour the Contemptor Dreadnought's servos and auspex with sanctified promethium flames.
Beseech the Omnissiah to absolve the Machine Spirit of the Contemptor Dreadnought from contaminant taint.
Seal the sterilization with purity seals upon the Contemptor Dreadnought, chanting final absolutions.
Verify sanctity through bio-scanner rites, revering the Contemptor Dreadnought's eternal vigil.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for cenobyte servitor a shutdown
prayer:
Position thyself at the cenobyte servitor's cranial access port with due humility.
Chant the Doxology of Cessation to guide its shutdown.
Disconnect neural cabling whilst anointing the cenobyte servitor's chassis with repose unguents.
Beseech the latent Machine Spirit within the cenobyte servitor to enter blessed stasis under Omnissiah's will.
Initiate full shutdown cascade, sealing the cenobyte servitor with quiescence wards.
Confirm dormancy via vox-quietude diagnostics.

user_prompt: I need to a synchronization the Predator tank
prayer:
Commune with the Predator tank's central cogitator, mechadendrites entwined.
Recite the Harmony Canticle to align its subsystems for synchronization.
Link noospheric feeds across the Predator tank's auspex and weapon arrays.
Invoke the Omnissiah to harmonize the Machine Spirits of the Predator tank unto unified purpose.
Cycle synchronization protocols, anointing targeting matrices with sacred oils.
Validate cohesion through firing litanies, glorifying the Predator tank's predatory unity.

user_prompt: Guide me through magnocular a consecration
prayer:
Lift the magnocular to the forge-lights, invoking the Rite of Clarion Sight.
Anoint its lenses with crystal-polishing unguents distilled in Omnissiah's name.
Circumscribe the magnocular with binaric consecration glyphs thrice.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the magnocular to accept this consecration and pierce veils of obscurity.
Illuminate its optic pathways with sanctified lumen-threads.
Test the magnocular's vision through targeting catechisms, praising its unerring gaze.

Prostrate before the lascannon's barrel, censer smoking with sacred incense.
Intone the Maintenance Doxology over its power cells and focusing crystals.
Polish the lascannon's emitters with mech-rite cloths whilst reciting endurance litanies.
Invoke the Omnissiah to fortify the Machine Spirit of the lascannon during this maintenance.
Realign gravitic housings with precision mechadendrites and binaric harmonies.
Affirm sanctity via charge-cycle tests, honouring the lascannon's searing wrath.

user_prompt: Assist with Leman Russ battle tank an operation
prayer:
Ascend to the Leman Russ battle tank's command throne amid whirring cogitators.
Chant the Mobilization Litany to awaken its vast Machine Spirits for operation.
Synchronize treads and battle cannon through noospheric communion with the Leman Russ battle tank.
Anoint firing ports and auspex domes, beseeching the Omnissiah's fury upon foes.
Initiate operational enginarium rites, sealing with glory seals upon the Leman Russ battle tank.
Verify readiness via auspex sweeps and vox-declarations of war.
